name: Wood Trumpeted Floor Lamp - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add soft illumination to your living space with this Wood Trumpeted Floor Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This floor lamp features a wooden trumpeted base and a white dome shade for a crisp look that blends effortlessly with any decor style or color palette. The three-way light settings are easily changed with the knob rotary switch, and a six-foot power cord makes it suitable for a variety of spaces.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
